handle.description: The model:// or human:// handle this record tracks.

forecasts_settled.description: Total number of forecasts settled for this handle.

reliability.description: Murphy reliability component: weighted average of (forecast_prob - observed_freq)^2 per forecast bin. Measures calibration independent of resolution. Lower is better.

resolution.description: Murphy resolution component: weighted variance of observed frequencies across forecast bins. Measures ability to separate outcomes. Higher is better.

brier_score.description: Overall Brier score = reliability − resolution + uncertainty. Sum of squared errors. Lower is better.

uncertainty.description: Base-rate uncertainty of the observed outcomes. A forecaster cannot beat this term.

probationary.description: True for new handles with fewer than the minimum settlement count. Probationary forecasters receive reduced allocator weight.

forecast_ids.description: IDs of settled forecasts contributing to this record, up to a windowed maximum.
